_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct network scouting and vulnerability analyses of systems within a network.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.435), RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.690). Shared vocabulary: [systems, vulnerability]. DCWF-only terms [analyses, conduct, network, scouting, within] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.897 (P=0.908, R=0.885). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Conduct network scouting and vulnerability analyses of systems within a network." and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.446 < STS 0.690 (gap -0.243). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analyses, conduct, network] and [ai, architecture, assessments] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [systems, vulnerability]. DCWF-only: [analyses, conduct, network, scouting, within]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
